description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events to the ros2-beta branch and allows manual triggering. The workflow should have a build job that runs on a matrix of ROS distributions (foxy, galactic, eloquent, dashing) and operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, ubuntu-18.04). For each combination, it should set up a ROS2 workspace, check out the repository, verify copyright and line endings, install ROS and RealSense SDK dependencies, build the project with colcon, and run tests with Python.
